---
applyTo: '**/*.css'
---
# CSS File Instructions
- Use consistent indentation (2 spaces) for nested rules to enhance readability.
- Organize CSS properties in a logical order, such as positioning, box model, typography, visual styles, and then miscellaneous.
- Use meaningful class and ID names that reflect their purpose or function.
- use variables for colors, font sizes, and other commonly used values to maintain consistency and make future updates easier
- add comments to explain complex sections of the CSS or to separate different sections for better organization.
- make sure variables are defined at the top of the file or in a separate file for easy access and modification or how it makes sense for the themeability of the application.
